narrative:
Precinct New Phila 3-C (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 387 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.7 percentage points.
